task: edu Day 0 checked concepts should count as completion and unlock Day 1

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion reporting requires requirement-to-evidence mapping, real runtime or user-facing verification, completion guard evidence, and exact residual risk reporting.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Day 0 concept checks must not leave the main case card and progress bar at 0%.
requirements_checklist.evidence: harness-os/backend/main.py now marks Day 0 completed when safety_orientation_confirmed has all required concept IDs; _edu_vp_refresh_state then reports Day 0 flow pct 100 and overall progress pct 50 when Day 1 is open.

requirements_checklist.requirement: After Day 0 learning/checks, the user should move to Day 1 practice.
requirements_checklist.evidence: Backend sets ui_state selected_stage/active_training_stage/show_continue_from to day1 and updates edu_cases status to vp_training_day1; TrainingScreen hydrates Day 1 after confirmation.

requirements_checklist.requirement: Regression tests should lock the new semantics.
requirements_checklist.evidence: tests/test_edu_vp_training_flow.py asserts safety confirmation completes Day 0, selects Day 1, flow pct is 100, and overall progress is 50.
